seo.title: Chrome Extension API for Browser Extensions
seo.description: How Chrome Extension API fits into real Browser Extensions workflows.

content.headline: Manifest V3 Compliance Validator
content.description: Validates Chrome extension manifests against Manifest V3 requirements, checking service worker compatibility, permission restrictions, and deprecated APIs.

examples.label: V2 to V3 Migration Check
examples.expected_output: { "compliant": false, "issues": ["Manifest version 2 is deprecated", "Background page usage requires service_worker replacement"], "suggestions": ["Set manifest_version to 3", "Replace background scripts with service_worker"] }

content.how_it_works: Parses input manifest JSON, checks for V3-specific requirements (service_worker usage, permission restrictions, API deprecations), and returns structured compliance results with actionable suggestions.
